---
title: "Spatial Analytics Exam"
author: "Alexandra Ciulisová and Zofia Radwańska"
date: "2026-05-09"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

#loading in the packages
```{r}
library(pacman)
pacman::p_load(tidyverse,
               readr,
               dplyr,
               ggplot
               
               )
```

#loading in the data
```{r}
file_path <- list.files(path = "/Users/zofiaradwanska/Desktop/Spatial_Analytics/exam/bird-dataset-main/data/normalised_trajectories", full.names = TRUE) 

semantic_info <- read.csv("/Users/zofiaradwanska/Desktop/Spatial_Analytics/exam/bird-dataset-main/data/semantic_info_entire_trajectories.csv")

demographic_data <- read.csv("/Users/zofiaradwanska/Desktop/Spatial_Analytics/exam/bird-dataset-main/data/questionnaires/pre_questionnaire_formatted.csv")

#extract participant id
trajectory_normalised <- file_paths %>%
  set_names() %>%
  map_df(~read_csv(.x, col_types = cols()), .id = "file_path") %>%
  # 3. Extract the last 12 digits from the path string
  mutate(participant_id = str_extract(file_path, "\\d{12}(?=\\.csv)")) %>%
  # Optional: remove the temporary path column
  select(-file_path)
```

#demographic statistics
```{r}
#116 participants in total (pre questionaire) but only 51 collected trajectories
demo_data_filtered <- filter(demographic_data, visitor_id %in% semantic_info$trajectory_id)

age_distribution <- demo_data_filtered %>% 
  summarise(mean = mean(age), median = median(age), sd = sd(age))

gender_distribution <- demo_data_filtered %>% 
  group_by(gender) %>% 
  summarise(count = n())

nationality_distribution <- demo_data_filtered %>% 
  group_by(nationality) %>% 
  summarise(count = n())

education <- demo_data_filtered %>% 
  group_by(diploma) %>% 
  summarise(count = n())

motivation <- demo_data_filtered %>%
  select(starts_with("motiv_")) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(.x == 1, na.rm = TRUE)))

goal <- demo_data_filtered %>%
  select(starts_with("visitGoal")) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(.x == 1, na.rm = TRUE)))


```

#semantic info
```{r}
duration <- semantic_info %>% 
  summarise(mean = mean(duration), meadian = median(duration), sd = sd(duration))

distance <- semantic_info %>% 
  summarise(mean = mean(length), median = median(length), sd = sd(length))

items_seen <- semantic_info %>% 
  summarise(mean = mean(nb_items), median = median(nb_items), sd = sd(nb_items))
```
